title: Old Republic-classic
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Old Republic-classic''' was a style of architecture. Following the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] occupation headquarters were based in an [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]-classic building.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

[[Category:Architecture]]
